User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block user-specific and query parameter pages
Disallow: /gallery/*
Disallow: /*?success=
Disallow: /*?canceled=

# Allow important pages
Allow: /discovery
Allow: /models
Allow: /pricing
Allow: /blog
Allow: /about
Allow: /features

# Sitemap (dynamic, generated by Firebase function)
Sitemap: https://dreambeesai.com/sitemap.xml

# Crawl-delay for politeness
Crawl-delay: 1
